case_title: TIEU HA VAN VS VETERAN'S CAB COQ et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY TIEU HA VAN AS TO DEFENDANT VETERAN'S CAB COQ LUXOR CAB CO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-01-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-24-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08 TRIAL OF SEP-01-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-24-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO OCT-16-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TIEU HA VAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VETERAN'S CAB COQ LUXOR CAB CO $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,008.00, DEFT. VETERAN'S CAB TO PAY $2000.00; DEFT. LUXOR CAB TO PAY $1000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT VETERAN'S CAB COQ LUXOR CAB CO
